body.title: Pull DeepSeek model on yogai7
body.result: Pull running via ollama_pull tool — erwan2/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B:latest downloading to akienyogai7; cluster_ssh Windows fix committed (6b5560e8)
body.description:
SSH to yogai7 (10.0.0.71) and run: ollama pull erwan2/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B:latest
yoga9i and akiendell already have it. yogai7 is missing it.
Tool: run_swarm_model_sync or ssh_exec with machine=yogai7, command="ollama pull erwan2/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B:latest"
This will take a long time on CPU — use no timeout.
After pull: verify via: ollama list on yogai7.
